creator: mezz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: mezz->freebsd-ports-bugs

Not Transmission bug, which it's palm/pilot-link's pilot-link.m4 bug. The 
solution is to get pilot-link update to 0.12.3 or above. See details: 

http://lists.pilot-link.org/pipermail/pilot-link-devel/2007-May/001657.html 

Click on Next message link to see solution replied.
